Centers content in a 900px bg2 panel with left/right borders, sitting
on the canvas gradient. Disables smooth scroll on articles to prevent
animated scroll restoration from visually sliding the panel into the nav.

feat(mps): add Phase 3 shape & index GPU kernels for where, masked_fill, tril, triu, index_select, gather, cat, stack (#30)

Add native Metal GPU kernels for 8 shape/index ops that previously fell
back to numpy. These are critical for training workloads (attention masks,
loss functions, embedding lookup, tensor assembly).

- 9 Metal shader templates: where (3 variants), masked_fill, tril, triu,
  index_select, gather, cat_copy
- 6 dispatch methods + ctypes encoder fallbacks in metal_compute.py
- GPU paths in ops.py with automatic bool-to-uint8 conversion for
  condition/mask tensors and int32 index casting for Metal compatibility
- stack implemented as zero-copy composite (unsqueeze + cat)
- 33 new tests in TestPhase3ShapeIndex covering all ops and dtypes

commit.message:
fix(docstore): SSE 진행률을 시뮬레이션 타이머 방식으로 전환

--- debug-note ---
when:
* 업로드/법령임포트/AI분석 시 SSE 실시간 진행률 표시 기능 사용 시

symptom:
* Vercel 서버리스 환경에서 SSE 이벤트가 전혀 전달되지 않음

context:
* Vercel serverless는 res.write() 호출을 버퍼링하여 res.end() 시점에 일괄 전송

root-cause:
* Vercel 서버리스 함수는 true SSE 스트리밍을 지원하지 않음

fix:
* 백엔드 API 3개(upload, law-import, documents)를 표준 JSON 응답으로 복원
* 프론트엔드에 useSimulatedProgress 커스텀 훅 도입하여 타이머 기반 진행률 애니메이션 구현
* 미사용 SSE 관련 state 변수 및 lib/sse.js 모듈 제거

verify:
* 업로드/법령임포트/AI분석 진행률 UI가 analyzeProgress2/uploadProgress/lawImportProgress 훅을 정상 참조
* SSE 관련 코드 잔존 없음 확인 (grep authFetchSSE/initSSE → 0건)

prevent:
* Vercel 서버리스에서는 SSE 대신 폴링 또는 프론트엔드 시뮬레이션 방식 사용
--- /debug-note ---

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

style: update 2KO Systems logo with new version

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: compiler guardrails on all mutating paths

Add ast_check_str pre-write guard to multi_patch, graph_rename,
graph_add, graph_create, and graph_move. All 5 were writing to
disk without syntax validation. Only patch/patch_string/patch_by_symbol/
patch_bytes were previously guarded.

Also promotes ast_check_str to pub(super), fixes graph_add test
(entity_type "function" → "fn" for Rust — guard correctly caught
the bad scaffold), and files #137 for health false positives on
function-pointer refs and serde defaults.

72 tests passing.

which uses the AI with full metadata context.

commit.message:
fix: close HTTP response in retrieveNanopubsFromPeers to prevent connection pool exhaustion

The returned Stream<MaybeNanopub> wraps an open CloseableHttpResponse but
never registered a close handler. When callers closed the stream, the HTTP
connection was never returned to the pool, eventually causing
ConnectionPoolTimeoutException and blocking all peer sync.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

- Add song to KTV tab listing in LanguagePage
- Font size A+/A- buttons now flash visible then fade back to transparent after 1.5s

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: route /api/* paths through Worker handlers on custom domain

The visibility gate was catching ALL non-.workers.dev requests and
proxying them to GitHub Pages origin, including /api/* paths. This
meant /api/infra/health and /api/infra/proxy-check were never reaching
their handlers when called from analyst.rizrazak.com.

Fix: skip the visibility gate passthrough when path starts with /api/
so API routes fall through to the route handlers.

Also changed GitHub Pages health check to fetch directly from the
riz-razak.github.io origin to avoid recursive Worker fetch.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

  to eliminate duplicate cache instantiation/error-handling in batch and streaming handlers
- Remove dead code: fallback cache instantiation in createStreamingResponse
- Unify activeRequestId to ref-only in useAgentSearch (remove redundant useState + useEffect sync)

fix: replace pwsh prebuild/predev with cross-platform Node.js cleanup script

scripts/clean-next-artifacts.mjs uses node:fs/promises rm() to remove
.next/trace and .next/dev before builds and dev runs. Fixes Vercel CI
failure ("pwsh: command not found" on Linux) and local post-test
.next/dev/types/validator.ts build break on Windows.

pnpm lint + typecheck + test (31 passed, 3 skipped) + build all pass.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: correct wave equation and falling sand bugs

Wave Equation (WaveEquationPage.tsx):
- Fix uniform buffer field order mismatch vs WGSL Params struct
  (damping was landing in mouseActive slot → zeroed waves every frame)
- Fix compute bind group prev/curr swap (binding 1=shader.prev, 2=shader.curr)
  were receiving the wrong buffers, causing time-reversed/diverging physics
- Add isPaused write to uniform buffer

Falling Sand (FallingSandPage.tsx):
- Remove Y-axis flip from mouse and touch coordinate mapping
  Grid y=0 renders at screen top (render shader does 1-uv.y), so mouse
  coords should NOT be flipped; fixes spawn position offset

FCM push notifications + WebSocket real-time chat

PART A: FCM Push
- app/services/fcm_push.py: Firebase Cloud Messaging service (10 notification types)
- Buyer/Seller/Actuator models: fcm_token + fcm_updated_at columns

PART B: WebSocket Chat

- JWT auth on first message, XSS sanitize, DB persist

- endpoints.ts: WS + FCM_TOKEN API constants

requirements.txt: firebase-admin + reportlab

Add glitch mode with generative audio, visual destruction effects, and perimeter frame FX

- Full-screen glitch overlay with pixel sort, monochrome scatter, feedback trail
- 10 scheduled visual effects: vertex trails, lissajous, slit-scan, feedback mirror,
  radial pulse, datamosh, blob tracking, ASCII blowout, video dropout, organic displacement
- Effect scheduler with staggered temporal variation and max concurrency
- 7-layer evolving drone: sub, eerie mid, spectral noise, high whistle, ring mod,
  stutter gate, with irrational LFO rates for arrhythmic Venetian Snares-inspired evolution
- IDM glitch engine (11 buffer types), 808 kicks, stutter bursts, white noise blasts
- Spectral steganography: portrait encoded as audio spectrogram
- Perimeter FrameFX with lissajous, crosshairs, ASCII fragments, datamosh blocks,
  radial arcs, scanning particles, pulse sweeps, signal bursts
- Glitch entry via nav name click, exit via left panel click or center text
- Blend mode cycling, dissolve animations, CSS invert on left panel

Add auth system: Google OAuth + email magic link login

auth cookie instead of client-supplied userId params.

- S3 (ANIMATE) is now the speed run (was S4)

  barriers from S2, knots from S2L3, stars/boost from S3, ramps from S4

commit.message:
fix: marks agent model mismatch + cascade only from infra steps

- Marks was configured with model google/gemini-3.1-pro-preview but
  routed to DeepSeek provider which can't serve it (400 Bad Request on
  every run). Changed to deepseek-chat.
- Cascade-fail logic was too aggressive: any single agent failure would
  mark all other pending agents as failed for that ticker. Now only
  cascades from infrastructure steps (data_fetch, data_validate,
  pre_filter, gate_decision) so agent failures are independent.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: 24 biomas distintos — sistema temperatura+humedad (Whittaker)

Biomas fríos: Tundra (plana, MOUND gris), Taiga (bosque, 4-25m)
Biomas templados: Estepa (árida), Llanura fría, Bosque templado, Pantano
Biomas cálidos: Sabana seca, Pradera, Bosque mixto, Selva templada, Manglar
Biomas tropicales: Desierto, Sahel, Sabana tropical, Selva tropical, Humedal
Biomas calientes: Gran desierto (grandes dunas), Badlands (roca+arena rugoso),
  Sabana árida, Selva densa (>40m), Archipiélago (islas bajas)
Montaña: Tierras altas, Montañas, Alpino/Volcánico (>100m, picos volcánicos)

- Ruido calculado una sola vez por tile (temp+humid+elev+rough+fine)
- Tinting de color por altura en buildChunkMesh:
  MOUND: rojizo (bajo) → gris roca (medio) → blanco nieve (>50m)
  GRASS: amarillento (sabana, h<3) → verde oscuro (pradera alta, h>18)
  FOREST: verde muy oscuro en selva alta (h>20)
  SAND: más dorado en dunas altas (h>12)
- Eliminadas funciones redundantes _globalH/_globalTile

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix(security): apply 12 remaining audit fixes + migrations

- CORS: lock down to explicit methods/headers (no more wildcards)
- Frontend: add 30s AbortController timeout to all API requests
- Encryption: upgrade key derivation from SHA256 to PBKDF2 (600k iterations)
- Passwords: enforce 12+ chars with uppercase, lowercase, digit, special char
- Security headers: add HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, etc.
- Health checks: actually query DB (SELECT 1) and ping Redis
- Audit logs: use db.flush() instead of db.commit() for transactional atomicity
- Pagination: add limit/offset to ownership history endpoint (max 200)
- Webhook secrets: encrypt with Fernet (LargeBinary column + helpers)
- Risk engine: compute real scores from Ownership, Dispute, Property data
- Request ID: always server-generated, ignore client X-Request-ID
- Alembic migration for webhook secret column (plaintext -> encrypted)
- Data migration script for re-encrypting PII after key derivation change

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Users without Ollama or LLM API can still use AEGIS with good accuracy via regex + negative patterns.

commit.message:
Fix CI deploy: preserve production DB before git pull in workflow

The CI script ran `git pull origin main` before `bash deploy.sh`, so the
backup/restore fix in deploy.sh was never reached.  Move the DB preservation
logic into the workflow itself, wrapping the git pull directly.  Also apply
the same pattern in deploy.sh for manual runs.

commit.message:
fix(cli): redefine status icons and fix init menu UX

- Redefine ~ icon to mean "partially configured" (was misleadingly
  "disabled"). Advanced naming now shows ~ when enforcement is on
  but not all sub-conventions are set.
- Replace yes/no text with ✓/✗ icons on submenu toggles
- Remove redundant "no test runner" info message that scrolled off
  screen (already shown in Coverage hint)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: use INSERT OR IGNORE to prevent UNIQUE constraint error on workspaces.path

Startup could fail with (code: 2067) when concurrent or repeated init
calls race past the check-then-insert guard. INSERT OR IGNORE makes the
database layer idempotent, silently skipping duplicate path inserts.

Fix video stretching in mixer — pass crop data through pipeline

Root cause: crop fields (video_crop_x/y/width/height, video_natural_width/height)
were present in globe data and DB but missing from mixer Track type and
convertIPTrackToMixerTrack(), so WebGL renderer never received them.

- Add crop fields to mixer Track type
- Pass crop fields through in MixerContext converter
- Add auto center-crop fallback in WebGL renderer for videos without
  explicit crop data (older uploads)

commit.message:
fix: inject today's date into CMA prompt for correct recency scoring

Claude needs to know the current date to calculate months_ago for each
comp's sold date. Without it, recency multipliers can't be applied
correctly and Claude may hallucinate dates.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
